mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_purchase_history (user_id, product_id, product_count, price, destination_id, purchased_at) SELECT c.user_id, c.product_id, c.product_count, p.price, #{destinationId}, now() FROM tbl_cart c JOIN mst_product p ON c.product_id = p.id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT ph.purchased_at AS purchasedAt, p.product_name AS productName, ph.price AS price, ph.product_count AS productCount, d.family_name AS familyName, d.first_name AS firstName, d.address AS address FROM tbl_purchase_history ph JOIN mst_product p ON ph.product_id = p.id JOIN mst_destination d ON ph.destination_id = d.id WHERE ph.user_id = #{userId} AND ph.status = 1 ORDER BY ph.purchased_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE tbl_purchase_history SET status = 0, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
